commit.subject: LU-17385 revert: LU-16826 tests: lfsck to repair a dangling remote entry
commit.message:
LU-17385 revert: LU-16826 tests: lfsck to repair a dangling remote entry

This reverts commit 07e02a600e5707de30e1441ce56b68b0cbc3c260.
It was causing regular failures in sanity-lfsck test_24 and test_26a.

Test-Parameters: trivial testlist=sanity-lfsck mdscount=2 mdtcount=4
